---
id: build-list
title: "List all builds of an app"
description: "List all the builds of a specified Bitrise app. Set parameters to filter builds: for example, you can search for builds run with a given workflow or all builds that were triggered by Pull Requests. It returns all the relevant data of the build."
sidebar_label: "List all builds of an app"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List all builds of an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/builds"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the builds of a specified Bitrise app. Set parameters to filter builds: for example, you can search for builds run with a given workflow or all builds that were triggered by Pull Requests. It returns all the relevant data of the build.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./build-list.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./build-list.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./build-list.StatusCodes.json")}
>
